case_title: STEPHANIE MANUEL VS. DIRECT TO HOME APPLIANCES LLC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,500.00 FILED BY MANUEL, STEPHANIE AS TO DEFENDANT DIRECT TO HOME APPLIANCES LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-08-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-08-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MANUEL, STEPHANIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIRECT TO HOME APPLIANCES LLC $5,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $195.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,695.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
